pageContext.name: Shinra Elite Security Officer and Motorcycle Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Square Enix present the Shinra Elite Security Officer and Motorcyle Set from FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE joins the PLAY ARTS KAI line up!  The coloring of the uniform, goggles, helmet, shoulder armor, and shoe belts are all expressed in detail to show the difference in rank from the general security officers.  Various interchangeable hand parts, including the hand holding the grenade, a tonfa that can be held in the dedicated hand or equipped against the thigh, machine gun, shotgun, stun baton, and various weapons are included as accessories, allowing various battle scenes in the game to be reproduced.   The motorcycle that accompanies the set also features a streamlined shape, a body with the SHINRA name engraved on it, a green-based color scheme, and details around the muffler and engine.
